title: hestia_query_policy — input + output schemas (v1)
description: Query the policy engine for an allow/deny/warn decision. v1 daemon evaluates against a real rule engine. See presence-protocol.md §3.4.

ruleId.description: Stable identifier for the rule that fired. `null` when the default policy applied.

ruleName.description: Human-readable rule name. `null` for default-policy decisions.

policyId.description: v0 alias of `ruleId`. Retained for back-compat. New code should read `ruleId`.

constraints.description: Audit-trail constraint strings prefixed with `policy:`, `decision:`, `rule:`. Always at least 3 entries when present.
